vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_bronze_040: Now, now, Brad. You know better than to eavesdrop on people's conversations. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_bronze_060: Nana Betty is a very busy business woman. I imagine she's juggling a hundred things at once, just like us. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_gold_050: Knock knock! Hello, you two. Er, oh... I hope we're not interrupting?  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_gold_080: Ahhh, baking the cake, are we? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_gold_100: No, no. Pretend I didn't say anything, I want it to be a surprise! (Giddy chuckle) Back to work everyone! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_intro_010: My esteemed colleagues, I welcome you to paradise! Or... at least what was paradise. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_intro_030: Nana Betty! A privilege, as always. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_intro_040: Now, there's no denying these islands have seen better days, but this fabled site has life in it yet! And we never shy away from a challenge, do we, Brad m'boy? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_intro_070: (Admiring Sigh) She's just the same as she is on the telly! What a national treasure. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_outro_010: (Gasp) My goodness, you've really worked wonders here, linking the past and the present. Not bad, ey, Nana Betty? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_silver_010: Well, the park is really starting to come together. Great work! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_silver_020: Although I'm still waiting on those cookies. Where could Betty be? Surely she's not still on the phone?! [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_silver_040: Aww, how sweet! She must want a photograph to remember the occasion. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_silver_060: Oh, maybe she is baking us an island themed cake, to celebrate the park? That would be so much better than a cookie. I'm drooling just thinking about it... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_silver_070: Anyway, don't let my belly hold you up. Continue working your magic! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_010: You've made great progress, so far... but now the real work begins! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_020: I can't wait to see what you achieve with us here at Coaster Coast. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_030: By happy chance, we already have some exciting projects lined up for you! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_040: We've been contracted to help out on a few of the Heritage Conservation Foundation's future projects. And... ah ha, right on time! I have someone I'd like you to meet. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_040_alt: We've been contracted to help out on a few of the Foundation's future projects. And... ah ha, right on time! I have someone I'd like you to meet. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_050: Ah! As luck would have it, I believe this is them now! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_060: Hello there! Adriana, is it? A pleasure to meet you.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter1_075: And, believe me, Miss Vega,  we shall be doing our utmost to honour our cultural heritage and ensure that future generations can both enjoy and learn from it. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter2_070: It would be our pleasure, Adriana! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter2_090: I'm thrilled to see that the magic of our parks has charmed Adriana! (Chuckles) Aye, I'm looking forward to hearing about these ideas she spoke of-- Oh my! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter2_110: (Gasp) Well I never. It's... are you... Nana Betty?! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter2_240: My my! I wonder what all that was all about. Perhaps I left him off the holiday card list?  [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter2_250: Not to worry, I'm sure it's all a misunderstanding. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter3_070: My ears are burning! Did someone call for the C-E-Ohhh... Kenta. What are you doing here? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter3_090: Kenta, it's not what you think, I assure you. If I could just explain- [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter4_030: I have no words! I'm honoured! Let me just go and find my autograph book. We can trade! (Laughs) My signature, for yours! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter4_090: Eugene! Brad! You boys won't believe- [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter4_180: Nana Betty! Is this true?! Tell me it isn't so! [sentiment=Sad]
vo_oswaldthompson_chapter4_210: Phew! That was a close one! I genuinely thought she wanted to help us. [sentiment=Sad]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_bronze_030: Just give it time, lad. The park is doing great, and I’m sure Eugene was just trying to protect you. Brotherly love and all that. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_gold_010: Well, this is just a marvel!  Excellent work everyone. See where your vision has gotten us, Brad? Hmm?  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_gold_040: Ah, Eugene. If he hadn't jumped at the opportunity, we might have missed out on all this! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_gold_050: Your instincts are the breadcrumbs leading you to your dreams! For me, they once led to me opening a bakery. Which, in turn, led me to more breadcrumbs. Ah, the circle of life. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_gold_060: But you can't deny how well this has all worked out, can you, hmm? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_intro_050: My oh my, I can picture it now! You’re onto something here, m’boy! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_intro_110: Oh, don’t you worry. What’s a little debt between friends? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_intro_120: Just you stick to your vision and we’ll make something incredible together. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_coastline_outro_020: This place is now flourishing instead of floundering! Huzzah! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_bronze_0: Ah, I believe he wants to see if we'll crumble under the pressure. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_gold_010: I couldn't be happier about this park! A cracking job! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_gold_040: Oh, he'll come around. All that anger doesn't disappear with the snap of your fingers. All we can do is keep showing him that we're not the people he thinks we are. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_gold_050: And that I'm not the person I used to be. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_gold_070: Me. I'm right here, Eugene... Are you ok? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_intro_01: Hello there! You'll see that today isn't like our usual jaunts. It's a picturesque spot but we've only been granted full access to half of the park. Apparently the owner will give us 'strict orders' for when we work on the other half. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_intro_03: I haven't the foggiest! This was all arranged with pseudonyms and fake moustaches. Well, maybe not the fake moustaches... [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_intro_04: The owner said they'd meet us here to tell us exactly what the- [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_intro_08: I always thought my true colour was the pleasant rosiness of my cheeks, and I'm not one to hide that. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_intro_10: Definitely not! Kenta went to all that trouble to trick us into coming, it would be rude to just leave. Besides, we're not ones to shy away from a challenge. We'll prove him wrong! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_outro_03: Well, I do admit I could be a bit... er, 'erratic' in my youth. You know, always drawn to the next shiny project... but I have learned from my mistakes, Kenta. That I promise you. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_outro_08: Ahhh, he will be... in time. At least, if he comes back, he'll come back to something wonderful. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_duellingparks_silver_0: Oh, we're not going anywhere! I know we haven't always seen eye to eye, but if there's one thing I've learned with my years, it's that the client is always right. [sentiment=Confident]
Perhaps I should have said that the client's requests are always right? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_bronze_010: Ah that's more like it! (Inhales) Take in that crisp, fresh air!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_bronze_030: Well, a bit more time and this park will be blooming – like a wee flower, you'll see! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_gold_010: Ah, what a triumph! Green trees and green energy, as far as the eye can see! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_intro_010: Well, what do you think? It's not every day that you see natural wonders like this! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_intro_020: Don't get too distracted though, we've got quite a task on our hands. The Foundation wants us to build a new, eco-friendly park as part of their 'Clean-n-Green' campaign. Thankfully, they've built some solar panels around the area to help us get started! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_intro_040: Ah, fear not, Adriana! I think we can do just that. We can even use natural resources to build some wooden coasters. At least, that's what I wood do. (Laughs) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_intro_060: Well, with some determination and a good team of janitors, we'll spruce this place up in no time! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_outro_010: Now this is what I call an environmentally friendly park! Don't ye agree, Adriana? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_outro_030: Ah, you see! I knew we'd win you over. (Chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_outro_050: Of course! Trust takes time to build, just like a good coaster, we must first lay the foundations for a solid partnership! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_silver_010: Well done! Just look at how nicely everything's coming along. It's simply radiating sustainability! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_ecopark_silver_040: Absolutely! While we're at it, how about we add in more trees and bushes. After all, we could all use some encourage-mint, hey? (Chuckles) [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_010: Oh, good! You made it! I gathered you all here today as Hank has some BIG news he'd like to share! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_090: Kenta! I didn't see you there. Hank here was just saying... [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_120: There is nothing to forgive. She manipulated us all. I knew that time would reveal all truths... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_140: Exactly. Wow, that's been an awful lot to take in. When I said Hank had some news, I thought he was going to reveal I'd given him a promotion! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_160: I would have recommended our friend here, but I think they've proven themselves to be a worthy successor of Coaster Coast. A job well done, if I do say so myself! The keys to the kingdom are finally yours. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_epilogue_170: I can't wait to see what you do next. After all, the world is your sandbox... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_bronze_070: A grand point! Now then, what's next on the list? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_gold_040: Hello you two! I've just come off the phone with Edith, she is absolutely thrilled with the park. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_intro_010: Hello there, my trusty companions! We've got a marvellous project on our hands. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_intro_020: Our client, Edith, is a lovely woman and the matriarch to a successful family run business franchise, no less! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_intro_040: (Chuckle) The very same, m'boy! She wants us to turn her stately garden into a theme park for her whole family to enjoy. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_intro_060: Nana Betty! We weren't expecting any visitors. What brings you to Edith's home? [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_intro_100: We're not one to turn down a helping hand when it's offered. On that note, let's get started! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_outro_010: Great work team, another successful project under our belts! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_outro_050: Now now, Eugene, everyone brings something to the table. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_gardenpark_outro_110: That was... odd. Regardless, this park will be a legacy for Edith's family for generations. Now we can let them enjoy it… our help is needed elsewhere! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_labyrinthsecrets_bronz: The park is really starting to pick up now! Is it living up to your vision, Adriana? [sentiment=Neutral]
Ooo, now there's an idea. I'd love a guided tour!  [sentiment=Happy]
Was that a joke, Miss Vega? [sentiment=Shocked]
(Chuckle) On the contrary, nothing is lost on Oswald B. Thompson! But if we're not careful, we'll lose track of time, so let's crack on. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_labyrinthsecrets_gold_: The guests are loving the labyrinthian layout. You still won't catch me down there, though! [sentiment=Confident]
My word, that's two jokes now! Eugene, check her temperature! [sentiment=Happy]
So are we, lass. You're basically an honorary member of Coaster Coast now! [sentiment=Happy]
That being said, there's still work to be done here!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_labyrinthsecrets_intro: I'm sure we'll be fine... Just, uh, don't let go of my hand, okay? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_labyrinthsecrets_outro: I finally built up the courage to go down there myself. It's quite a-maze-ing, isn't it? (Chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
Although, I saw that some numpty had been leaving twine all along the paths. I thought I'd clean it up before someone tripped. [sentiment=Confident]
Oh, er, well... I'm sure we can still find our way. We'd better hurry, too, there are more parks needing our expertise!  [sentiment=Confused]
Now, was it left... or right? Left. No, right! Oh, I'm all turned around! [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_labyrinthsecrets_silve: Agreed, it's both exhilarating and terrifying. It's a good thing they don't exist anymore...  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_bronze_02: That's wonderful news! We should get started on the next one then, post-haste! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_bronze_04: Why, of course! We shall continue our work with care, respect... and an appropriately-restrained dash of enthusiasm! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_gold_030: I have to say, you two would make quite a team, like... who was it again, Eugene? Hannibal and Alexander? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_gold_050: But imagine if they had! They'd be as unstoppable as one of these beautiful coasters! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_intro_010: Ah, great, you made it! Quite the trek, eh? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_intro_020: We have rather an interesting project on our hands today. The Foundation has finished excavating a site where they discovered not one but four ancient coasters and have hired us to fix them up! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_intro_060: Coastonians? That's a new one to me. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_outro_030: You should embrace change, m'boy! I choose to change my underwear at least twice a day! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_outro_050: Anyway, with the coasters all fixed up, it's time for a new challenge! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_outro_090: Say no more lad, say no more. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_lostmonument_silver_02: We're doing some of our best work here. The crew are really digging all the history... (chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_newnaturereserve_bronz: Ha ha, if it isn't my two favourite Newtons! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_newnaturereserve_intro: Ah! Good! Now that everyone is here, I present to you this beautiful landscape. [sentiment=Happy]
The reality here might be slightly different, though... As you can see, it hasn't been well maintained, so it's in a bit of a mess. [sentiment=Neutral]
But fear not, we'll have this place looking like the Viking heartland of your dreams in no time! [sentiment=Confident]
Ha ha! We, here, at Coaster Coast thrive on such a challenge. We will restore this beauty and showcase mother nature in all her glory!  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_newnaturereserve_outro: I'd say it's about time for us to set sail! Another venture awaits! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_planningpermissionfail: Eugene! It's rude to ask someone their age. Please excuse him, Nana Betty.   [sentiment=Shocked]
Let's all get back to the job at hand. [sentiment=Neutral]
Well, we've almost got all of the land back! A job well done, I'd say. [sentiment=Happy]
It would be my honour. I shan't be a moment! [sentiment=Confident]
Right, there you go! You keep yourself warm, now. [sentiment=Confident]
Hello, hello everyone! We've got a rather interesting challenge ahead of us here on these green pastures. [sentiment=Neutral]
When the client bought this location they started building their ideal theme park. However, there were some crossed wires in the transaction. [sentiment=Neutral]
You see, they actually only bought a little piece of the land… [sentiment=Neutral]
Oh nonsense! I don't even read the big print. [sentiment=Happy]
Oh, Nana Betty, it is an honour! What brings you to this neck of the woods today? [sentiment=Neutral]
Oh, your kindness is always unmatched, but you needn't go out of your way. We have it all in hand here at Coaster Coast! [sentiment=Happy]
Speaking of which, we should probably make a start! [sentiment=Happy]
Amazing work! Where is Nana Betty? I thought she would want to see the finished result. [sentiment=Confused]
Oh, that's a shame! She is a very busy woman, though. [sentiment=Confused]
Agreed! Great work as always, team! [sentiment=Happy]
What is it? What have you found? [sentiment=Shocked]
Wow, a griffin? And a lesser-spotted one, too! I've heard about them from Adriana but I didn't think they existed... I have to go and find my phone, she won't believe it! [sentiment=Shocked]
Right, I'm back and- oh... and Adriana's replied with... a bunch of laughing faces? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_bronze_010: Both sides are well under way now, excellent work! Uh... where is Brad? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_040: Ah, easy there, boys. I'm sure my eager prodigy here can help both of you. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_050: Why don't the two of you go and grab your plans, hmm? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_060: (Sighs) Sorry about that. Their sibling rivalry has really started to get out of hand. [sentiment=Sad]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_070: Funnily enough, that's exactly what happened here with the original owners of this park. You see, they were brothers too, and their disagreements led to them splitting the park in half.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_080: It didn't work out for those siblings... but I believe, with your help, we can turn competition into complementation! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_090: Our Newton boys must learn to work together, to help and inspire each other! There's no reason this park can't accommodate both Eugene's exemplary feats of engineering AND Brad's exhilarating thrill rides. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_splitpark_intro_120: (Interrupts) Ah ah ah! Leave these two with me. Why don't you make a start in the meantime? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_010: Before we get started, we have a checklist of objectives from HR that we need to go through. I know, I know, but it's been company policy ever since one of our interns didn't know how to move around. We left them to it... only to find them in the same spot three days later. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_020: Ho-ho! That won't be you though, let's try moving the camera around the park now. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_030: See? It's easy-peasy! Now, you'll see that we have a ride here that's not yet open to the guests, we wanted you to do the honours! Just select The Forge ride and change it from 'Closed' to 'Open'. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_040: Ahhh, your very first ride opening. I remember mine well. Our confetti order was delayed, so I stayed up until 4:00 in the morning shredding paper sick bags. Clean ones, of course… [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_050: Where was I? Oh, yes! Always remember to change your rides to 'Open'. If all your rides are closed, the guests will have nothing to do but leave the park. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_060: Where was I? Oh, yes! It's always good to check in on Guest Thoughts. As you might expect, they tend to think about all sorts of things, such as if certain rides are closed. These can serve as useful reminders that you may have forgotten something! Go on, try it out now. They don't mind! At least... I don't think they do? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_080: Ah, jolly good then. Now, all you have to do is very politely select one of the guests. They're quick little mites though, so it's handy to Pause time while doing this. Don't forget to unpause though after you're done! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_080_a: Jolly good, you're a natural! It's worth noting that if you ever want a quiet moment to examine the park, you can pause and fast forward time. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_100: They all seem to be in a good mood, which is great to see! However, Planconians are complex creatures, so it's good to keep checking in on them.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_110: Now, I've got something that I think you'll enjoy... It's time to build your first ride! I'll hand you over to, Eugene. He won Ride Engineer Of The Year in 2016, so you're in good hands. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_250: Don't overthink it, Eugene! It's also worth noting that our guests will have to pay for tickets to enjoy the rides in our parks. We control how much we charge though, for now, so let's encourage guests to ride our latest attraction by setting the Ticket Price to 'Bargain'. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_250_a: It's also worth noting that our guests will have to pay for tickets to enjoy the rides in our parks. We control how much we charge though, so let's encourage guests to ride our latest attraction by setting the Ticket Price to 'Bargain' for now. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_260: Don't worry though, we can always increase the price later. As I like to say, 'when you achieve popularity, charge Premium for prosperity!' [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_260_a: We can always increase the price later. As I like to say, 'when you achieve popularity, charge Premium for prosperity!' [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_bronze_270: But one step at a time, ey? For now, a very well done and a shiny medal earned! That's your first ride built. And I'm sure it'll be the first of many! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_110: Hiring staff is just the beginning though. You also need to pay attention to Staff Morale. If it gets too low, staff will start to quit their jobs. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_120: Breaks are absolutely essential when it comes to keeping Staff Morale up and, just like guests, our staff need a place to re-energise. To make all of their tired little dreams come true, you should place a Staff Building.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_130: Admittedly, they're not the most glamorous of buildings, so I'd advise you to place your Staff Building away from the guest areas, wherever possible. After all, we don't want to bring down that Scenery Rating that you worked so hard to build up! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_140: Great! Now the park staff have somewhere to go on their breaks and enjoy some peace and quiet. We just need to ensure our inquisitive guests don't go waltzing on in there for the free coffee, claiming to be 'lost'. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_150: The best way to avoid this is by connecting an exclusive staff-only path to the building. Guests won't dare step foot on those tiles. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_160: Anyway, where were we? Ah yes, the staff breaks! It's worth hiring extra staff members to cover for those having a rest. Vendors are pretty adept when it comes to manning their shops and will swap in and out as necessary. Hire some now and you can leave them to it! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_160_alt: Anyway, where were we? Ah yes, the staff breaks! It's worth hiring extra staff members to cover for those having a rest. Vendors are pretty adept when it comes to manning their shops. Hire some now and you can leave them to it! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_170: Ride Attendants will also swap in and out themselves. However, it's good to keep an eye on their shifts through the staff scheduling system, as an unstaffed ride won't be operational. With that in mind, we should hire some Ride Attendants and get them settled in! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_180: Another thing that can impact staff morale is their pay. Check back on the Staff Panel and adjust where necessary. Underpaid staff will feel underappreciated… and before we know it, we'll be understaffed. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_190: Okay, I think that just about covers everything on Staff Morale. Keep checking back to see how they're getting on and hopefully you'll start seeing some steady improvements. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_250: These are all of the items we'll be able to unlock once we have enough Research Points. Let's aim to unlock the Ride Pack, I can guarantee it'll bring a tear to Eugene's eye, or another one at least, to see our vision come to life!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_250_alt: These are all of the items we'll be able to unlock once we have enough Research Points. Let's aim to unlock the Coaster Pack, I can guarantee it'll bring a tear to Eugene's eye, or another one at least, to see our vision come to life!  [sentiment=Neutral]
Let's take a look at the Research Tree and aim to unlock the Ride Pack. It'll bring a tear to Eugene's eye. [sentiment=Neutral]
Let's take a look at the Research Tree and aim to unlock the Coaster Pack. It'll bring a tear to Eugene's eye. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_gold_260: Let's leave the Mechanic to it for now, we'll revisit this soon! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_intro_010: Why hello there! I'm glad you could make it. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_intro_020: I'm Oswald B. Thompson, the CEO of Coaster Coast! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_intro_040: Not to worry, Eugene, this is the person I was telling you about. You're looking at the successor of Coaster Coast... well, providing everything goes smoothly, of course. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_intro_050: I can't just hand them the keys to the kingdom now, can I? Ey? (Chuckles)  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_intro_070: Marvellous! Well, with that sorted I think it's about time Eugene, our brilliant Ride Engineer, and I showed you the ropes. Consider this your official induction! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_050: Ah, just in time! Our mechanic has earned enough Research Points to unlock an exciting new roller coaster! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_050_al: Ah, just in time! Our mechanic has earned enough Research Points to unlock something exciting!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_070: The very same, lad! I was just about to make a start on it, but I tell you what, why don't you walk our new friend through it? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_150: Oh ho, that is a beauty! Terrific work, you two! This is a coaster that truly deserves a place in the spotlight, so how about we put together an Advertisement to mark the occasion, hmm? Head to the Advertising tab in the Park Management menu, and let's show the world what the park has to offer! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_155: There are different audiences to cater for, however, so it's worth considering which Advertisement will bring the most guests to your park! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_160: While we wait for our campaign to start bringing in more guests, why don't you try out the Ride Camera and experience all the exhilaration the coaster will have to offer first hand? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_160_al: Why don't you try out the Ride Camera and experience all the exhilaration the coaster will have to offer first hand? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_170: How was that? Enough for the time being? (chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_180: Thank you again for all of your hard work. Coaster Coast is going to be in the best of hands, I can tell. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_outro_200: (chuckles) I'm not going anywhere just yet, Eugene, don't panic! We're just getting started, dipping our toes in the- actually, hold that thought… I've got just the job lined up for you! I'll send you the details, see you soon! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_010: The addition of a new ride will have given a slight boost to our Park Rating.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_015: Multiple different factors contribute to this rating, so you'll want to pay attention to the Park Rating overview. The better the rating, the more guests will visit! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_040: Oh, Eugene, you needn't always push for perfection. Right now, our duty is to these fine Planconians and their basic needs.  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_050: So, number 1, you need drinks. Number 2, you need food. Number 3... actually, maybe needing the toilet should be among the first two.  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_060: Let's start by quenching any thirst amongst our guests with a new Drink Shop!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_070: Now, drinks are all well and good, but there's more to lunch than quenching thirst. Guests will need a place to eat, too! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_090: Brilliant! Now, the guests will need somewhere to relieve themselves after all that intake. Why not build a Toilet nearby? We wouldn't want our guests walking around with crossed legs now, would we? That isn't good for anyone's posture! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_110: Amazing work! The guests will be a lot happier now. However, it does come at a price. More food and drink in the park also means more waste.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_130: Now then, when it comes to bins, as great as they are, they do tend to look... well, a bit rubbish. I'd recommend giving the guests some scenery to look at while they stroll along the paths. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_140: I've marked out an area which could do with a nice, decorative touch. Just remove any objects that are in your way and then take your pick from some of Eugene's expertly-crafted scenery blueprints. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_160: Ah, fantastic work! Don't stop there though, let's also add some scenery around the ride you built. That way, guests can enjoy the view while they queue! (Chuckle) View, queue! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_160_a: Fantastic! That'll keep the park looking cleaner. We shouldn't stop there though, let's make the park look even better by adding some scenery around the ride you built. That way, guests can enjoy the view while they queue! (Chuckle)  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_silver_170: I think that's everything checked off the scenery list! Well done! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_variable_010: Ah, I was wondering watt you were doing. (Chuckle) You seem to have placed the building in an unpowered area! Not to worry, it's not your volt. Simply move the building into an area powered by electricity.  Oh, and sorry about the electrical puns, they really just amp me up... I'll see myself out. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_variable_020: Woah, hey big spender. Looks like you're getting a little low on funds there. We have some petty cash lying around that Eugene was saving for new glasses. Not too worry, I'm sure he'll be fine. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_variable_030: Take your time, put your feet up. I've got nowhere else to be. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_variable_040: Ah, I see what you're trying to do there. I admire your ambition, but we must work through this checklist before we can really sign you off for such things. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial1_variable_050: You've made it successfully to the Staff Scheduling screen! There's a lot of information available here so, for now, let's just focus on assigning a Mechanic to Research.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_gold_240: Hello, boys! I wanted to check in and see how the onboarding was going with our new friend here... but I can see there was nothing to worry about. The park is looking great. I knew you were the right pick for the job! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_gold_250: It seems you're running out of space though. That simply won't do! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_gold_260: I'll transfer over some money for you to purchase the new area of land. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_intro_010: Ah, it's good to see you again! Come along, you're right on time. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_intro_020: Now, this park is going to be slightly different from the previous park... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_intro_030: 'How?!' I hear you cry out in anticipation! Well, my eager beaver, we're going to expand this park into... drum roll, please! A water park! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_intro_040: Of course, we wouldn't expect you to start building pools and flumes all on your own. So, I'd like to hand you over to Brad Newton, our very own water ride engineer! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_outro_010: And with that, your initial onboarding is complete!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_outro_020: It's time for you to take what you have learned here and apply it to new parks! If you want to hang around here a bit longer though, Eugene has prepared a list of objectives for you to make your way through. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_outro_060: You've got the Newton brothers' seal of approval, a mighty feat indeed! (Chuckle) I'll leave you to it. I need to go and make the preparations for our next endeavour! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_tutorial2_variable_010: Ah, I see we're having a little cashflow problem. Well, there's nothing for it. Brad, I'm giving them your pocket money for the month. [sentiment=Neutral]
